languages.text: {n}Янрис смахивает выступивший на лбу пот, затем принимается вытирать пухлую кисть шелковым платком.{/n} "Ваша Светлость? Увенчались ли ваши поиски успехом? Удалось что-то узнать о судьбе загадочного Себериана?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Янрис смахивает выступивший на лбу пот, затем принимается вытирать пухлую кисть шелковым платком.{/n} "Ваша Светлость? Увенчались ли ваши поиски успехом? Удалось что-то узнать о судьбе загадочного Себериана?"
traits.speaker: HighFactotum_MB

languages.text: {n}Janris wipes the sweat from his brow, then sets to drying his fleshy hand with a silk handkercher.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? Has your search been successful? Have you learned anything about the fate of the mysterious Seberian?"
languages.original_text: {n}Янрис смахивает выступивший на лбу пот, затем принимается вытирать пухлую кисть шелковым платком.{/n} "Ваша Светлость? Увенчались ли ваши поиски успехом? Удалось что-то узнать о судьбе загадочного Себериана?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Janris wipes the sweat from his brow, then sets to drying his fleshy hand with a silk handkercher.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? Has your search been successful? Have you learned anything about the fate of the mysterious Seberian?"

{n}Janris wipes the sweat from his brow, then sets to drying his fleshy hand with a silk handkercher.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? Has your search been successful? Have you learned anything about the fate of the mysterious Seberian?"

languages.text: {n}詹里斯用丝绸手帕擦了擦额上的汗，又用它擦拭他那只肉手。{/n}“大人？搜寻还顺利吗？关于那位神秘的塞贝里安的最终命运，您找到什么线索了吗？”
languages.original_text: {n}Janris wipes the sweat from his brow, then sets to drying his fleshy hand with a silk handkercher.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? Has your search been successful? Have you learned anything about the fate of the mysterious Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: {n}詹里斯用丝绸手帕擦了擦额上的汗，又用它擦拭他那只肉手。{/n}“大人？搜寻还顺利吗？关于那位神秘的塞贝里安的最终命运，您找到什么线索了吗？”

languages.text: {n}Janris se limpia el sudor de la frente con una mano carnosa que luego procede a secarse con un pañuelo de seda.{/n} «¿Mi{mf|lord|lady}? ¿Ha sido provechosa la búsqueda? ¿Ha averiguado algo sobre el destino del misterioso Seberian?».
languages.original_text: {n}Janris wipes the sweat from his brow, then sets to drying his fleshy hand with a silk handkercher.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? Has your search been successful? Have you learned anything about the fate of the mysterious Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Janris se limpia el sudor de la frente con una mano carnosa que luego procede a secarse con un pañuelo de seda.{/n} «¿Mi{mf|lord|lady}? ¿Ha sido provechosa la búsqueda? ¿Ha averiguado algo sobre el destino del misterioso Seberian?».

languages.text: {n}Janris essuie la sueur sur son front et sèche sa grosse main avec un mouchoir en soie.{/n} « Votre Seigneurie ? Vos recherches ont-elles porté leurs fruits ? Avez-vous appris ce qu'il était advenu du mystérieux Seberian ? »
languages.original_text: {n}Janris wipes the sweat from his brow, then sets to drying his fleshy hand with a silk handkercher.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? Has your search been successful? Have you learned anything about the fate of the mysterious Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Janris essuie la sueur sur son front et sèche sa grosse main avec un mouchoir en soie.{/n} « Votre Seigneurie ? Vos recherches ont-elles porté leurs fruits ? Avez-vous appris ce qu'il était advenu du mystérieux Seberian ? »

languages.text: {n}Janris wischt sich den Schweiß von der Stirn, ehe er seine fleischige Hand mit einem seidenen Taschentuch trocken tupft.{/n} "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}? War Eure Suche erfolgreich? Habt Ihr etwas über das Schicksal des mysteriösen Seberian in Erfahrung gebracht?"
languages.original_text: {n}Janris wipes the sweat from his brow, then sets to drying his fleshy hand with a silk handkercher.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? Has your search been successful? Have you learned anything about the fate of the mysterious Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Janris wischt sich den Schweiß von der Stirn, ehe er seine fleischige Hand mit einem seidenen Taschentuch trocken tupft.{/n} "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}? War Eure Suche erfolgreich? Habt Ihr etwas über das Schicksal des mysteriösen Seberian in Erfahrung gebracht?"

languages.text: {n}Janris, alnındaki teri silip ardından etli ellerini ipek bir mendille kurulamaya koyuluyor.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Aramanız başarılı oldu mu? Gizemli Seberian'ın kaderi hakkında bir şey öğrendiniz mi?"
languages.original_text: {n}Janris wipes the sweat from his brow, then sets to drying his fleshy hand with a silk handkercher.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? Has your search been successful? Have you learned anything about the fate of the mysterious Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Janris, alnındaki teri silip ardından etli ellerini ipek bir mendille kurulamaya koyuluyor.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Aramanız başarılı oldu mu? Gizemli Seberian'ın kaderi hakkında bir şey öğrendiniz mi?"

languages.text: {n}ジャンリスは額の汗を拭い、絹の手拭きで手首を拭いた。{/n} 「{mf|閣下|閣下}、お探しになったのですか？謎のセベリアンの運命について何かお聞きになったのですか？」
languages.original_text: {n}Janris wipes the sweat from his brow, then sets to drying his fleshy hand with a silk handkercher.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? Has your search been successful? Have you learned anything about the fate of the mysterious Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: {n}ジャンリスは額の汗を拭い、絹の手拭きで手首を拭いた。{/n} 「{mf|閣下|閣下}、お探しになったのですか？謎のセベリアンの運命について何かお聞きになったのですか？」
